query:
SELECT id, indication, icd_codes_raw, scientific_name, trade_name
FROM drug_entries
WHERE indication IS NOT NULL AND indication != ''
LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT id, indication, icd_codes_raw, scientific_name, trade_name
FROM drug_entries
WHERE indication IS NOT NULL AND indication != ''
LIMIT 20
